# SRC060 - Google Ads Misrepresentation Policy

## Metadata

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Section | Platform Policy |
| Authors / source | Google |
| Year | Current |
| Source type | Official ad policy |
| Quality | High |
| URL | [https://support.google.com/adspolicy/answer/6020955?hl=en](https://support.google.com/adspolicy/answer/6020955?hl=en) |

## Bias / limitation

Platform policy.

## Core takeaway

Ads and destinations that mislead by hiding relevant info or providing misleading product/business information are prohibited.

## How the marketing agent should use it

Use to structure destination QA and claim checks.

## Tactics unlocked

- Convert source insight into a campaign hypothesis.
- Translate the hypothesis into one ad angle, one landing-page proof section, and one measurement plan.
- Record whether the tactic worked in `memory/tactic_performance.md`.

## Agent instruction

When this source is relevant, write one sentence explaining **why this source applies to the buyer state** before using it.

## Research extraction template

```markdown
### Source extraction

- Source ID: SRC060
- What it changes about our strategy:
- What it proves:

- Landing page proof suggested:
- Measurement implication:
- Follow-up source needed:
```
